location.geocoded_address_osm: Nairobi, Zimmerman, Soko ya Mawe, Nairobi, Kenya

description:
4 Bedroom Duplex Apartments For Sale In Riverside

A modern, bright, and elegantly designed 4-bedroom duplex apartment on Riverside Drive, featuring unobstructed views and the soothing sound of the Nairobi River. A striking floor-to-ceiling 6-meter window floods the space with natural light.

The apartment includes spacious open and private living areas, 4 en suite bedrooms, 3 balconies, a laundry room, and a DSQ with a separate entrance. Located on a high floor, it offers 3 dedicated parking spaces.

Residents enjoy a communal rooftop with a unique swimming pool, event facilities, steam and sauna rooms, and breathtaking 360-degree views of Nairobi. The complex provides 24-hour security.

New developments nearby offer easy access to dining, grocery stores, coffee shops, and more.

location.geocoded_address_osm: Escape Room Kenya, 320, Ngong Road, Karen, Karen ward, Langata, Nairobi, 00505, Kenya

description:
Prime Gated Community | Brand New | Private Pool & Gym | ½ Acre

Discover unparalleled elegance in this stunning, newly built 6-bedroom townhouse located in one of Karen's most exclusive gated communities. Designed for the discerning buyer seeking space, privacy, and modern luxury, this exceptional home sits on a generous half-acre plot and offers a sophisticated lifestyle in Nairobi's prestigious Karen suburb.

Property Highlights:
6 Spacious En-Suite Bedrooms - All master suites feature generous proportions, high-end finishes, and ample natural light.
Private Swimming Pool - Your own resort-style pool for relaxation and entertaining.
Dedicated Gym Room - Fully equipped private fitness space within the home.
Expansive Living Areas - Open-plan design with premium contemporary finishes, flowing seamlessly to outdoor entertainment spaces.
Land Size: ½ Acre (approx. 0.5 acres) - Rare for a townhouse, providing exceptional privacy and garden space.
Brand New Construction - Modern architecture with top-tier quality materials and craftsmanship.

This is a low-density development where each residence enjoys complete exclusivity. The secure gated community offers 24-hour security, manicured communal grounds, and a serene environment surrounded by Karen's iconic greenery, horse trails, and upscale amenities.

Ideal for High-End Buyers:
Families seeking a luxurious family home
Executives and diplomats looking for privacy and prestige
Investors looking for a premium trophy property in one of Nairobi's most sought-after locations

Asking Price: KSh 190 Million (slightly negotiable)
This is a rare opportunity to own a turnkey luxury townhouse in Karen with private pool and gym on half an acre. Early viewing is highly recommended as properties of this caliber are limited.

For viewing and further details, contact the developer's representative.

description:

The property currently comprises two independent fully furnished villas, comfortably accommodating up to 10 guests, all centred around a private swimming pool and elegant outdoor entertaining areas.

An additional 100 sqm upper floor has already been constructed and is ready to be completed, increasing the accommodation to up to 14 guests while further enhancing both the property's value and its income potential.

The estate offers approximately 340 sqm of total built area and includes two fully equipped kitchens, spacious living areas, air-conditioned bedrooms, a private swimming pool, tropical gardens, an outdoor bar, private well, backup generator and secure private parking.
